parameters.functionCode:
// Define 7-day drip sequence
const customerName = $input.first().json.name;
const customerEmail = $input.first().json.email;
const plan = $input.first().json.plan;

const dripSequence = [
  { day: 1, subject: '🚀 Welcome! Here's your first win', body: `Hi ${customerName},

Your account is ready! Let's start with something quick.

✅ First task: Set up your profile (takes 2 min)
→ Login: https://app.yourcompany.com/profile

This unlocks personalized recommendations.

Tomorrow: We'll show you our #1 time-saving feature.`, delayHours: 0 },
  { day: 2, subject: '⏱️ Save 2 hours this week', body: `Hi ${customerName},

Day 2 tip: The #1 feature our power users love is [Feature X].

📊 Average time saved: 2 hours/week
🎯 How to use it:
1. Go to Dashboard
2. Click [Feature]
3. Enable auto-processing

Try it now: https://app.yourcompany.com/dashboard`, delayHours: 24 },
  { day: 3, subject: '🔗 Connect your first integration', body: `Hi ${customerName},

Day 3: Let's connect your tools.

Popular integrations for ${plan} users:
• Slack — get instant notifications
• Google Sheets — auto-export data
• Zapier — connect 5000+ apps

Set up: https://app.yourcompany.com/integrations`, delayHours: 24 },
  { day: 4, subject: '📊 See what's possible', body: `Hi ${customerName},

Check out what ${plan} users accomplish:

📈 Case study: How [Company] saved 15 hours/week
→ Read: blog.yourcompany.com/case-study

Your account has the same capabilities. Let us help you unlock them.`, delayHours: 24 },
  { day: 5, subject: '📞 Free onboarding call — 15 min', body: `Hi ${customerName},

You're halfway through your first week!

🎁 Book a free 15-min onboarding call:
→ calendly.com/yourcompany/onboarding

Our team will:
• Answer your questions
• Set up advanced features
• Create a custom workflow for you

Spots fill fast — grab yours now.`, delayHours: 24 },
  { day: 6, subject: '💡 Quick win: Keyboard shortcuts', body: `Hi ${customerName},

Pro tip: Keyboard shortcuts save hours.

⌨️ Top 5 shortcuts:
• Ctrl+N: New item
• Ctrl+K: Quick search
• Ctrl+S: Save
• Ctrl+D: Duplicate
• Ctrl+/: Help

Full cheat sheet: docs.yourcompany.com/shortcuts`, delayHours: 24 },
  { day: 7, subject: '🎯 Your first week summary', body: `Hi ${customerName},

You completed your first week! Here's your progress:

📊 Onboarding Score: [Auto-calculated]
✅ Completed: Steps finished
⏳ Next: Advanced features

🚀 Ready for more?
• Upgrade plan: billing.yourcompany.com
• Join community: community.yourcompany.com
• Book advanced training: calendly.com/yourcompany/advanced

We're here for you. Just reply anytime.`, delayHours: 24 }
];

return dripSequence.map(email => ({
  json: { ...email, customerName, customerEmail, plan }
}));
